video_info.title: The Emirates FA Cup 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: After a turbulent campaign and an underwhelming league finish, could this be a chance for Chelsea to redeem themselves at Wembley? Or will Manchester City, featuring in a record fourth successive FA Cup final, go on to lift yet another trophy? Find out as we bring you all action from the Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 Final, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: New Zealand Women's Tour of England 2026
video_info.shortDescription: England Women head into the 3rd ODI with a 1–0 lead after winning the opener, while the second match was abandoned, leaving New Zealand in a must-win situation to avoid a series defeat. England will look to seal the series at home, while New Zealand must deliver a complete performance under pressure to force a share of the spoils. Tune in to catch all the action from the 3rd ODI of New Zealand Women's Tour of England 2026, LIVE only on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: Bundesliga 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Bayern Munich welcome FC Koln in a Bundesliga matchday clash, with the champions aiming to finish the season strongly in front of their home fans. Koln will look to stay compact and frustrate Bayern’s attacking firepower in what promises to be an intense encounter. Catch all the action from Bundesliga 2025-26, LIVE on Sony LIV.
